programme.title: Fashion TBC
programme.desc: Treat yourself to some retail therapy without even leaving the house! With 24/7 service, quality assured products and a 30 day money back guarantee, there is no shopping experience quite like TVSN!

programme.title: Gravitas
programme.desc: The host provides a concise overview and in-depth analysis of social, political and economic news stories from around the world.

programme.desc: The host provides a concise overview and in-depth analysis of social, political and economic news stories from around the world.

programme.desc: The host shares a detailed analysis of the latest news stories from various spheres including political and socio-economic issues from across the globe.

programme.title: Honey Kaha
programme.desc: A low-budget streetwise cop, Honey Kaha, takes to the streets to fight oppression and colonisation. 2023. New Zealand. Director: Te Waiarangi Ratana. Starring: Kura Turuwhenua, Bailey Poching.

programme.title: Godard Cinema
programme.desc: With over 60 years of cinema and 140 films under his belt, Jean-Luc Godard is one of the most renowned French New Wave artists of all time. 2022. France. Director: Cyril Leuthy.

programme.title: When Fall Is Coming
programme.desc: After a mushroom related incident, a grandmother struggles under the weight of her guilt. 2024. France. Director: Francois Ozon. Starring: Helene Vincent, Josiane Balasko.

programme.title: Holy Cow
programme.desc: Totone trades in teenagehood to provide for his kid sister, turning to cheese making for a steady income. 2024. France. Director: Louise Courvoisier. Starring: Clement Faveau, Maiwene Barthelemy.

programme.title: Once Upon A Time Michel Legrand
programme.desc: Rising to fame through the French New Wave, Michel Legrand's story is told with never-before-seen archives and personal accounts. 2024. France. Director: David Dessites.

programme.title: Beyond
programme.desc: 1/8. A fight for life and death follows, as the search for Gorski comes to a close. 2024. Germany. Director: Adolfo J. Kolmerer. Starring: Julius Gause, Lucas Gregorowicz.

programme.title: Widows
programme.desc: The wives of four criminals are widowed after their husbands are caught in a shoot-out with police. 2018. UK, US. Director: Steve McQueen. Starring: Viola Davis, Michelle Rodriguez.

programme.title: The Stones And Brian Jones
programme.desc: Discover the musical talent of Brian Jones, and reveal the inner workings of the greatest rock'n'roll band in the world, The Rolling Stones. 2023. UK. Director: Nick Broomfield.

programme.title: Marie Antoinette
programme.desc: 1/5. Becoming king initially paralyses Louis, and Marie is drawn into the tussle over the choice of prime minister. 2022. France. Director: Geoffrey Enthoven. Starring: Emilia Schule.

programme.title: Marie Antoinette
programme.desc: 1/6. To salvage the royal marriage - and their nations' alliance - Antoinette's brother Joseph intervenes. 2022. France. Director: Geoffrey Enthoven. Starring: Emilia Schule.

programme.title: Marie Antoinette
programme.desc: 1/7. Antoinette is pregnant - but a pamphlet circulates depicting Chartres as the father. 2022. France. Director: Geoffrey Enthoven. Starring: Emilia Schule, Louis Cunningham.

programme.title: Marie Antoinette
programme.desc: 1/8. Louis supports the rebel colonies in America against France's old enemy, England. 2022. France. Director: Geoffrey Enthoven. Starring: Emilia Schule, Louis Cunningham.

programme.title: The Critic
programme.desc: A critic, an actress, and the owner of a newspaper become entangled in a web of lies following a murder. 2023. UK, USA. Director: Arnand Tucker. Starring: Ian McKellen, Gemma Arterton.

programme.title: Holy Cow
programme.desc: Totone trades in teenagehood to provide for his kid sister, turning to cheese making for a steady income. 2024. France. Director: Louise Courvoisier. Starring: Clement Faveau, Maiwene Barthelemy.

programme.title: Once Upon A Time Michel Legrand
programme.desc: Rising to fame through the French New Wave, Michel Legrand's story is told with never-before-seen archives and personal accounts. 2024. France. Director: David Dessites.

programme.title: Widows
programme.desc: The wives of four criminals are widowed after their husbands are caught in a shoot-out with police. 2018. UK, US. Director: Steve McQueen. Starring: Viola Davis, Michelle Rodriguez.

programme.title: Beyond
programme.desc: 1/8. A fight for life and death follows, as the search for Gorski comes to a close. 2024. Germany. Director: Adolfo J. Kolmerer. Starring: Julius Gause, Lucas Gregorowicz.

programme.title: The Stones And Brian Jones
programme.desc: Discover the musical talent of Brian Jones, and reveal the inner workings of the greatest rock'n'roll band in the world, The Rolling Stones. 2023. UK. Director: Nick Broomfield.

programme.title: The Critic
programme.desc: A critic, an actress, and the owner of a newspaper become entangled in a web of lies following a murder. 2023. UK, USA. Director: Arnand Tucker. Starring: Ian McKellen, Gemma Arterton.

programme.title: Widows
programme.desc: The wives of four criminals are widowed after their husbands are caught in a shoot-out with police. 2018. UK, US. Director: Steve McQueen. Starring: Viola Davis, Michelle Rodriguez.

programme.title: The Man Between
programme.desc: In post WWII Berlin, the sister of a British officer must be rescued by a German smuggler. 1953. UK. Director: Carol Reed. Starring: James Mason, Claire Bloom.

programme.title: A Man And A Woman
programme.desc: A Widow and a Widowers' friendship blooms into romance, but can they overcome their tragic pasts. 1966. France. Director: Claude Lelouch. Starring: Anouk Aimee, Jean-Louis Trintignant.

programme.title: Tigerland
programme.desc: Forced to become a soldier, one man struggles to remain human in the face of the Vietnam war. 2000. Germany, USA. Director: Joel Schumacher. Starring: Colin Farrell, Matthew Davis.

programme.title: Poison
programme.desc: After years apart, a couple is reunited, but their passionate reunion reignites long forgotten memories. 2024. Netherlands. Director: Desiree Nosbusch. Starring: Tim Roth, Trine Dyrholm.

programme.title: Marie Antoinette
programme.desc: 2/1. Marie Antoinette and Louis embrace modern rule, but enemies lurk everywhere, even in Versailles. 2025. France. Director: Edward Bazalgette. Starring: Emilia Schule.

programme.title: Marie Antoinette
programme.desc: 2/2. Marie Antoinette's affair with Fersen reignites - could it be part of a carefully orchestrated plot? 2025. France. Director: Edward Bazalgette. Starring: Emilia Schule.

programme.title: Marie Antoinette
programme.desc: 2/3. The people of Paris openly protest against Marie Antoinette as she protects her unborn child. 2025. France. Director: Edward Bazalgette. Starring: Emilia Schule, Louis Cunningham.

programme.title: Marie Antoinette
programme.desc: 2/4. Marie Antoinette changes her image, and the King and Queen find happiness when they experience 'ordinary' life. 2025. France. Director: Edward Bazalgette. Starring: Emilia Schule.

programme.title: Tata
programme.desc: A moldovian journalist recieves an alarming video from her father, uncovering a generational pattern of domestic violence. 2024. Romania, Germany, Netherlands. Director: Lina Vdovii, Radu Ciorniciuc.

programme.title: Of Money And Blood
programme.desc: 1/1. A customs inspector and his team uncover a scam involving two criminals and a trader. 2023. France. Directors: Xavier Giannoli, Frederic Planchon. Starring: Vincent Lindon.

programme.title: Of Money And Blood
programme.desc: 1/2. Fitous, Bouli and Attias prepare a scam around the purchase and resale of carbon quotas. 2023. France. Directors: Xavier Giannoli, Frederic Planchon. Starring: Vincent Lindon.

programme.title: Of Money And Blood
programme.desc: 1/3. Those close to Attias are worried about him frequently seeing Fitous and Bouli. 2023. France. Directors: Xavier Giannoli, Frederic Planchon. Starring: Vincent Lindon.

programme.title: A Man And A Woman
programme.desc: A Widow and a Widowers' friendship blooms into romance, but can they overcome their tragic pasts. 1966. France. Director: Claude Lelouch. Starring: Anouk Aimee, Jean-Louis Trintignant.

programme.title: Tata
programme.desc: A moldovian journalist recieves an alarming video from her father, uncovering a generational pattern of domestic violence. 2024. Romania, Germany, Netherlands. Director: Lina Vdovii, Radu Ciorniciuc.

programme.title: Poison
programme.desc: After years apart, a couple is reunited, but their passionate reunion reignites long forgotten memories. 2024. Netherlands. Director: Desiree Nosbusch. Starring: Tim Roth, Trine Dyrholm.

programme.title: The Man Between
programme.desc: In post WWII Berlin, the sister of a British officer must be rescued by a German smuggler. 1953. UK. Director: Carol Reed. Starring: James Mason, Claire Bloom.

programme.title: A Man And A Woman
programme.desc: A Widow and a Widowers' friendship blooms into romance, but can they overcome their tragic pasts. 1966. France. Director: Claude Lelouch. Starring: Anouk Aimee, Jean-Louis Trintignant.

programme.title: Tata
programme.desc: A moldovian journalist recieves an alarming video from her father, uncovering a generational pattern of domestic violence. 2024. Romania, Germany, Netherlands. Director: Lina Vdovii, Radu Ciorniciuc.

programme.title: Infernal Affairs
programme.desc: A model police cadet, and a Triad gang recruit go undercover to infiltrate the other. 2002. Hong Kong. Directosr: Wai Keung Lau, Alan Mak. Starring: Andy Lau, Tony Leung Chiu-wai.

programme.title: Yurlu Country
programme.desc: An ode to Country, and a profound account of one Aboriginal elder's final year spent trying to preserve his culture and heal his homeland. 2025. Australia. Director: Yaara Bou Melhem.

programme.title: Andamooka
programme.desc: As her 30th approaches, a girl leaves the city to spend the birthday with her best friend. 2025. Australia. Directors: Danni Ogilvie, Mara Jean Quinn. Starring: Mara Jean Quinn, Georgina Neave.

programme.title: Cottontail
programme.desc: Kenzaburo and his estranged son Toshi travel to England to scatter her ashes at Lake Windermere. 2023. UK, Japan. Director: Patrick Dickinson. Starring: Ciaran Hinds, Thomas Coombes.

programme.title: Marie Antoinette
programme.desc: 2/5. When Marie Antoinette is implicated in the diamond necklace theft, she is determined to prove her innocence. 2025. France. Director: Raf Reyntjens. Starring: Emilia Schule.

programme.title: Marie Antoinette
programme.desc: 2/6. As the public trial begins, events quickly spiral out of Marie Antoinette and Louis's control. 2025. France. Director: Raf Reyntjens. Starring: Emilia Schule.

programme.title: Marie Antoinette
programme.desc: 2/7. Political turmoil, a struggling economy, and personal attacks push Louis toward a nervous breakdown. 2025. France. Director: Raf Reyntjens. Starring: Emilia Schule.

programme.title: Marie Antoinette
programme.desc: 2/8. Amid the revolution's advance, Marie Antoinette struggles to support Louis's rule. 2025. France. Director: Raf Reyntjens. Starring: Emilia Schule, Louis Cunningham.

programme.title: Queens
programme.desc: An estranged father's re-enters the picture as a mother and three daughtersflee political tensions in Lima. 2024. Peru. Director: Klaudia Reynicke. Starring: Abril Gjurinovic, Luana Vega.

programme.title: Of Money And Blood
programme.desc: 1/4. Fitous, Bouli and Attias move into a house in Tel Aviv to launch hostilities. 2023. France. Directors: Xavier Giannoli, Frederic Planchon. Starring: Vincent Lindon.

programme.title: Of Money And Blood
programme.desc: 1/5. The identity of Simon's informant is revealed; Fitous, Bouli & Attias are making millions. 2023. France. Directors: Xavier Giannoli, Frederic Planchon. Starring: Vincent Lindon.

programme.title: Of Money And Blood
programme.desc: 1/6. The French authorities finally try to arrest Fitous, Bouli and Attias but make a mistake. 2023. France. Directors: Xavier Giannoli, Frederic Planchon. Starring: Vincent Lindon.

programme.title: Infernal Affairs
programme.desc: A model police cadet, and a Triad gang recruit go undercover to infiltrate the other. 2002. Hong Kong. Directosr: Wai Keung Lau, Alan Mak. Starring: Andy Lau, Tony Leung Chiu-wai.

programme.title: Yurlu Country
programme.desc: An ode to Country, and a profound account of one Aboriginal elder's final year spent trying to preserve his culture and heal his homeland. 2025. Australia. Director: Yaara Bou Melhem.

programme.title: Andamooka
programme.desc: As her 30th approaches, a girl leaves the city to spend the birthday with her best friend. 2025. Australia. Directors: Danni Ogilvie, Mara Jean Quinn. Starring: Mara Jean Quinn, Georgina Neave.

programme.title: Cottontail
programme.desc: Kenzaburo and his estranged son Toshi travel to England to scatter her ashes at Lake Windermere. 2023. UK, Japan. Director: Patrick Dickinson. Starring: Ciaran Hinds, Thomas Coombes.

programme.title: Queens
programme.desc: An estranged father's re-enters the picture as a mother and three daughtersflee political tensions in Lima. 2024. Peru. Director: Klaudia Reynicke. Starring: Abril Gjurinovic, Luana Vega.

programme.title: Infernal Affairs
programme.desc: A model police cadet, and a Triad gang recruit go undercover to infiltrate the other. 2002. Hong Kong. Directosr: Wai Keung Lau, Alan Mak. Starring: Andy Lau, Tony Leung Chiu-wai.

programme.title: Infernal Affairs II
programme.desc: In this prequel, a policeman sets out to infiltrate the Triad gangs. 2003. Hong Kong, Singapore. Directors: Wai Keung Lau, Alan Mak. Starring: Edison Chen, Shawn Yue.

programme.title: The Holy Mountain
programme.desc: A powerful alchemist leads a messianic man and seven of his disciples to the holy mountain. 1973. Mexico. Director: Alejandro Jodorowsky. Starring: Alejandro Jodorowsky, Horacio Salinas.

programme.title: The Thing With Feathers
programme.desc: A recently widowed father's life derails when a feathered figure begins stalking him. 2025. Brazil, France. Director: Dylan Southern. Starring: Benedict Cumberbatch, Sam Spruell.

programme.title: Unmoored
programme.desc: A successful TV presenter's life is upturned when she confronts her husband about his allegations. 2023. Iceland. Director: Caroline Ingvarsson. Starring: Anna Prochniak, Kris Hitchen.
